courseTitle: Level Design, Spaces, and Encounter Craft
title: Clockwork Courtyard
genericDescription: Shape combat through space; use enemy composition and arena changes; pace intensity across phases.
specificDescription: A three-phase encounter where gates, cover, enemy pressure, and resources rotate through the arena without hiding the rules.
gradingRubric: 30 pts encounter pacing; 20 pts arena affordances; 20 pts phase differentiation; 15 pts fairness and telegraphing; 15 pts testing.
